summary: Pass A frontend e2e on the public preview URL — ALL 10 requested flows verified. Home Spring edit grid renders 4 product cards; Shop catalog renders 12 product cards and a click navigates to /shop/{id}; Tailoring & Services renders 10 service cards (>=8 expected); customer nav exposes data-testid='nav-wishlist-btn' with a numeric badge data-testid='nav-wishlist-count' that increments after a heart toggle; logged-out heart click on a ProductCard fires a sonner toast ('Sign in to save favourites') and does NOT add to wishlist; logged-in demo customer (demo@siriboutique.in) hearts product p12, badge becomes 2 (one item from prior seed + p12), and /account?tab=wishlist renders 2 product cards including the just-saved one; product detail page (/shop/p12) renders [data-testid='reviews-section'] with average stars + write-a-review form and submit (rating 5, body, no title) created the review and toast 'Thank you for your review' appeared; admin product image upload via [data-testid='product-image-upload'] uploaded a JPEG to backend object storage, preview src=/api/files/siri-boutique/products/<uuid>.jpg appeared instantly, Save created TEST_UploadProduct (now 13 rows, was 12) and image renders in product list; Admin Dashboard shows [data-testid='low-stock-panel'] with 1 item (Veera Lehenga, 2 left).

issues: Reviews component renders unconditionally on mount but data fetch can race with quick navigation. First-visit check from a card click occasionally observed the [data-testid='reviews-section'] node not yet in DOM when queried within 500ms after networkidle; subsequent visits always render. Consider adding a lightweight skeleton/placeholder so layout doesn't shift while the GET /products/{id}/reviews is in-flight. Not a functional bug.
Dead helper `fileToDataUrl` (lines 177-185) flagged as 'legacy fallback (unused after object-storage upload)'. Safe to delete to keep the file lean.

action_items: (optional) Add a small skeleton/loader inside <Reviews/> so the section is in the DOM before the API resolves (purely for first-paint stability; no functional issue today)
critical_code_review_comments: WishlistContext.toggle returns a boolean but does not handle 401 from /wishlist/{pid} POST/DELETE — if the cookie/token is silently expired the catch-less await will surface as a console exception and the heart UI will desync with server state. Consider refresh()-on-error fallback.

ProductCard heart button is nested inside a <Link> wrapper and relies on e.preventDefault()+e.stopPropagation(). Works in tests, but on touch devices the click can still bubble in some browsers — consider rendering the heart as an absolutely positioned sibling outside the <Link> for safety.

Reviews.jsx submit() does not optimistically prepend the new review and waits for full reload. Fine for now, but on slower connections the user sees the toast before the list updates; could feel inconsistent.

AdminProducts onFiles uploads files sequentially in a for…of loop — slow for multi-image batches. Could use Promise.all for parallel upload (still serialised by browser HTTP/2, but UX gain on retries).
AdminDashboard fetches /admin/stats, /admin/orders, /admin/low-stock independently with no loading state for low-stock — minor, but a flicker is visible on slow networks before the panel renders.

CustomerNav 'nav-wishlist-btn' navigates to /login when logged out instead of allowing the heart-toggle path to drive sign-in flow — consistent with current spec but worth confirming product intent (could push deep link via ?next=/account?tab=wishlist).
AccountPage useEffect re-fetches /wishlist on every tab change, not only when entering the wishlist tab. Negligible cost but unnecessary.
test_credentials: Admin admin@siriboutique.in / SiriAdmin@2026 ✓ (admin login redirects to /admin), Demo demo@siriboutique.in / demo1234 ✓ (login redirects to /).
seed_data_creation: Wish-listed p12 (Anaara Lehenga) under demo customer (now 2 items in wishlist incl. one pre-existing). Created one review on p12 (rating 5, body 'Lovely fabric and beautiful drape...— TEST'). Created admin product 'TEST_UploadProduct' priced ₹1234 with one uploaded JPEG image stored at /api/files/siri-boutique/products/7222091adc644c87ab03a466d91efef6.jpg. Admin product count is now 13 (was 12).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Pass A frontend flows are GREEN on https://custom-stitch-hub-3.preview.emergentagent.com. data-testids confirmed present and stable: nav-wishlist-btn, nav-wishlist-count, wishlist-toggle-{pid}, product-card-{pid}, reviews-section, rating-star-1..5, review-title-input, review-body-input, submit-review-btn, review-{id}, product-image-upload, product-modal, save-product-btn, low-stock-panel, low-stock-{pid}. Seed data left behind: TEST_UploadProduct admin row + 1 wishlist item + 1 review for p12 — main agent may want to clear via admin UI or DB cleanup before subsequent test runs. p07 stock is 2 (low-stock list), Veera Lehenga has 2 left as well. No unfixed bugs blocking sign-off.
